phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è la Casa di Giulietta?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH lah KAH-zah dee joo-LYET-tah?
phrases.cultural_note: Juliet's House on Via Cappello is a medieval house with a courtyard balcony — whether Shakespeare visited or not, it draws millions of visitors.

responses.english: On Via Cappello, three minutes from Piazza delle Erbe.
responses.phonetic: een VEE-ah kap-PEL-loh, ah treh mee-NOO-tee dah PYAHT-tsah DEL-leh ER-beh.
responses.french: In Via Cappello, a tre minuti da Piazza delle Erbe.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Piazza delle Erbe is

responses.english: It's the heart of the historic centre, we're almost there.
responses.phonetic: eh eel KWOH-reh del CHEN-troh STOH-ree-koh, chee SYAH-moh KWAH-zee.
responses.french: È il cuore del centro storico, ci siamo quasi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy tickets for an Arena opera
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si comprano i biglietti per l'Arena di Verona?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see KOM-prah-noh ee beel-YET-tee per lah-REH-nah dee veh-ROH-nah?
phrases.cultural_note: The Verona Arena hosts open-air opera every summer — its acoustics are legendary despite no amplification.

responses.english: At the Arena box office, in Piazza Bra.
responses.phonetic: AL-lah beel-yet-teh-REE-ah del-lah-REH-nah, een PYAHT-tsah brah.
responses.french: Alla biglietteria dell'Arena, in Piazza Bra.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to eat Veronese cuisine
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si mangia la cucina veronese tipica?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see MAN-jah lah koo-CHEE-nah veh-roh-NEH-zeh TEE-pee-kah?

responses.english: At Al Desco or Dodici Apostoli, the most renowned.
responses.phonetic: al DES-koh oh dah rees-toh-RAN-teh DOH-dee-chee ah-POS-toh-lee, ee PYOO fah-MOH-zee.
responses.french: Al Desco o da Ristorante Dodici Apostoli, i più famosi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which train goes to Venice from Verona
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quale treno va a Venezia da Verona?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-leh TREH-noh vah ah veh-NET-tsyah dah veh-ROH-nah?

responses.english: The Frecciarossa or Frecciargento, about one hour.
responses.phonetic: eel fret-chah-ROS-sah oh eel fret-CHAR-jen-toh, CHEER-kah oo-NOH-rah.
responses.french: Il Frecciarossa o il Frecciargento, circa un'ora.
